name: ADT ICE Patient Feed Agent
description: Agentic test for ADT (Admit-Discharge-Transfer) patient demographic feeds from EPR (EPIC/Cerner) into ICE. Creates a patient in the EPR, verifies they appear in ICE with correct demographics, then updates and verifies again.

steps.description: Launch the EPR system and log in with test credentials
Register a new patient in the EPR with surname ZZZTEST and a unique identifier
Enter patient demographics: First name, surname ZZZTEST, DOB, gender, address, NHS number
Save the new patient record in the EPR
Screenshot the patient demographics from the EPR for evidence
Navigate to ICE and search for the patient by NHS number or MRN
Log into ICE with test credentials
Search for the patient using their NHS number
Verify the patient appears in ICE with correct demographics matching the EPR
Screenshot the patient record in ICE showing matched demographics
Return to the EPR and update the patient's address and phone number
Modify the patient's address details and save the changes
Screenshot the updated demographics in the EPR
Navigate back to ICE and search for the same patient again
Verify the updated demographics are reflected in ICE
Screenshot the updated patient record in ICE as final evidence
If testing merge/unmerge, create a duplicate patient and run the merge workflow
Verify the merged patient record shows both identifiers
Screenshot the merged patient record with both MRNs visible
If testing deceased/reverse, mark the patient as deceased then reverse
Screenshot the deceased patient record
Reverse the deceased status and verify
Screenshot the final patient record with deceased status removed
Log all evidence paths and complete the test cycle
